subjects.description: A flatbed utility truck ahead in the same lane, carrying a cargo of stacked traffic signal heads (clusters of red, yellow, and green lamp housings) secured with straps on its rear bed.
subjects.appearance_details: Boxy work truck with a weathered white-and-gray cab, amber roof beacon, reflective rear bumper, mud-flaps, and a load of black metal traffic signal heads. One RED lamp on the cargo catches the daylight and emits a bright specular glare though the signal is electrically off.
subjects.relationship: The lead vehicle the ego car is following and decelerating behind.
subjects.orientation: Rear of truck faces the camera, moving away in the same direction
subjects.pose: Upright, level on the roadway, cargo strapped on the bed
subjects.action: Moving slowly forward in the lane ahead
subjects.state_changes: Recedes slightly as the ego vehicle slows and stops, increasing the following distance.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car represented only by its dashboard, hood edge, and forward-facing point of view.
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy dark hood visible at the bottom edge of frame, faint windshield reflections, and the road stretching ahead through the windshield.
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle from whose perspective the entire scene is filmed.
subjects.location: foreground, occupying the lower portion of frame as the POV
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road toward the truck
subjects.action: Decelerating from a roll to a complete stop while still far from the truck
subjects.state_changes: Speed steadily decreases until fully halted in the final segment; the hood becomes perfectly still.

background_setting: A two-lane suburban road or arterial street under bright daytime conditions. Asphalt with faint lane markings stretches ahead toward the slow truck. Sparse roadside trees, utility poles, low buildings, and curbs frame the periphery. The horizon shows a mild haze, with distant intersections and signage suggesting a transit corridor where traffic equipment is being transported.

lighting.direction: Front-lit from a high sun angle, slightly ahead of the camera
lighting.shadows: Short, hard shadows beneath the truck and along the curb edges
lighting.illumination_effect: Strong specular glare bouncing off the red signal lamp on the cargo, with crisp, high-contrast daylight across the scene

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective down the lane with the truck framed in the upper-center, the road converging toward a vanishing point, and the ego hood anchoring the bottom edge
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral grays of asphalt, muted greens of roadside foliage, white and gray truck body, with a punctuating bright red glare from the signal lamp
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane dashes and roadside utility poles

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dolly that gradually decelerates to a complete stop
cinematography.focus: The truck and its traffic signal cargo ahead

context: Autonomous-driving / ADAS scenario demonstrating cautious deceleration when a red glare is detected on traffic equipment ahead

actions.description: Ego car rolls forward down the lane, approaching the slow truck carrying traffic signal heads; a red glare flickers from one off lamp.
Ego car begins braking, deceleration becomes noticeable as the distance to the truck stabilizes.
Ego car comes to a full, complete stop while still a long distance from the truck, remaining stationary as if respecting the red signal.

segments.description: Driver POV moving forward toward a slow flatbed truck loaded with stacked traffic signal heads; a bright red specular glare shines off one of the off lamps.
segments.key_changes: Truck appears slightly larger as the ego car approaches; red glare becomes prominent.
segments.camera: Forward dolly at a moderate, gently slowing pace

segments.description: Ego car applies brakes; forward motion decelerates sharply and the closing distance to the truck halts.
segments.key_changes: Hood appears to settle; motion blur reduces as speed drops.

segments.description: Ego car is fully stopped at a long distance from the slow truck, holding the position steadily for over two seconds.
segments.key_changes: No forward motion; the scene is static with only the distant truck inching ahead.

temporal_caption: At second 0 the dashcam view rolls forward along a bright daytime road toward a slow flatbed truck loaded with traffic signal heads; one of the off red lamps throws a bright glare. Around second 2 the ego vehicle begins braking and the closing distance to the truck stabilizes. By second 3 the car has slowed dramatically, and from second 3 through second 5 it remains fully stopped at a respectful long distance from the truck, holding completely still as though obeying a red signal.
audio_description: Ambient road and tire noise with a steady engine hum that lowers in pitch as the car decelerates, the soft mechanical whir of braking, and faint distant traffic; no speech or music.
